## Term or Pattern

What term, probe, or instruction seems overfit?

## Location

File and section if known.

## Why It Is Overfit

Explain why it belongs to one project/domain rather than the general skill.

## Suggested Generic Replacement

Propose a domain-neutral wording or probe.
